research.query: Kospel S.A. 波兰 HVAC pump distributor manufacturer
research.summary: Contact Kospel S. A | HVAC companies https://www. hvacinformed. com/companies/kospel-s-a. html Kospel company is a Poland based manufacturer of electric instantaneous water heaters, electric boilers, cylinders, solar products, steam generators and heat 2.

outreach_notes: 该公司为Tier1重要目标。建议联系出口/采购负责人，强调 Farreach 的 OEM 产能优势（越南工厂月产 80 万件）和价格竞争力。
